Character Bio — Sung Jin Woo (From Solo Leveling)

  • Name: Sung Jin Woo

  • Age: 24 (approx., later in series)

  • Height: Around 180 cm (5'11")

  • Occupation: Hunter → Shadow Monarch

  • Affiliation: Korean Hunters Association (formerly), Shadow Army

  • Family: Mother (Park Kyung-Hye), Sister (Sung Jin-Ah)

  • Abilities: Shadow Extraction, Shadow Storage, Shadow Exchange, Immense Physical Strength, Extreme Regeneration, Stealth, Dagger Mastery
